# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
from collections import defaultdict

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    cuboids = []
    index = 1
    
    for _ in range(N):
        x1 = int(data[index])
        y1 = int(data[index + 1])
        z1 = int(data[index + 2])
        x2 = int(data[index + 3])
        y2 = int(data[index + 4])
        z2 = int(data[index + 5])
        index += 6
        cuboids.append((x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2))
    
    # For each face, store the cuboids that have that face
    face_map = defaultdict(set)
    
    for i, (x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2) in enumerate(cuboids):
        # Front face (z = z2)
        face_map[(x1, y1, z2, x2, y2)].add(i)
        # Back face (z = z1)
        face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2)].add(i)
        # Left face (x = x1)
        face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x1, y2)].add(i)
        # Right face (x = x2)
        face_map[(x2, y1, z1, x2, y2)].add(i)
        # Bottom face (y = y1)
        face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y1)].add(i)
        # Top face (y = y2)
        face_map[(x1, y2, z1, x2, y2)].add(i)
    
    result = [0] * N
    
    for i in range(N):
        x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2 = cuboids[i]
        # Check for matching faces
        # Front face
        if len(face_map[(x1, y1, z2, x2, y2)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x1, y1, z2, x2, y2)]) - 1
        # Back face
        if len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2)]) - 1
        # Left face
        if len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x1, y2)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x1, y2)]) - 1
        # Right face
        if len(face_map[(x2, y1, z1, x2, y2)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x2, y1, z1, x2, y2)]) - 1
        # Bottom face
        if len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y1)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x1, y1, z1, x2, y1)]) - 1
        # Top face
        if len(face_map[(x1, y2, z1, x2, y2)]) > 1:
            result[i] += len(face_map[(x1, y2, z1, x2, y2)]) - 1
    
    for count in result:
        print(count)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
